name: Brookfield Oaktree Holdings, LLC
business: Brookfield Oaktree Holdings, LLC holds Credit, Real Estate and Equity investments managed by leading alternative asset management firms Oaktree Capital Management, L.P. and Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. The Company is the issuer of the Series A and Series B preferred units listed on the NYSE.
sellsTo: Preferred unitholders as holders of Series A and Series B preferred units

exposures.sentence: Technological developments in artificial intelligence could disrupt the markets in which Oaktree operates and subject Oaktree and us to increased competition, legal and regulatory risks and compliance costs, which could have a material adverse effect on Oaktree's business or our business, financial condition and results of operations.
